name: Pork Roast
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all seasonings in a small bowl.
2. Rub the mixture over the surface of the roast.
3. Spray the bottom rack of the oven with no-stick cooking spray.
4. Place the roast on the bottom rack.
5. Pour 1 cup hot water into a glass baking dish.
6. Cook according to package guidelines until the internal temperature reaches 160-170°F (71-77°C).
7. Remove the roast from the oven and cover it tightly with foil.
8. Let the roast stand for 10 to 20 minutes before slicing.
